positive: A whimsical and stylized geometric forest scene. Central composition featuring stylized, overlapping forest silhouettes of towering trees, exotic flora, and winding paths. The color palette should utilize deep indigo, teal, warm gold accents, and earthy terracotta, creating a magical, retro-art aesthetic reminiscent of Art Deco mixed with nature motifs. High contrast black lines outlining the silhouettes against a softly glowing gradient background. Focus on strong, legible shapes and clean edges, perfect for repeat or placement print on apparel. Detailed texture visible only in the gradient background, while foreground shapes must be solid, flat silhouettes.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor details, photorealistic, 3d rendering
